summary: Testing 3 Fresh Meals page fixes (/dine/meals): P0 - Ticket creation no navigation, P1 - Mira chat quick action chips, P2 - Hero text contrast and orb size. All 3 issues VERIFIED as FIXED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Fresh Meals page issues are now fixed and verified.

P0_ticket_no_navigation.details: Clicking 'Book consultation' CTA stayed on /dine/meals, did NOT navigate to /inbox. Toast showed 'Request sent to Concierge®'. Console confirmed: [USC] navigateToInbox: false in FreshMealsCuratedPicks.jsx line 216

P1_mira_quick_action_chips.code_reference: MiraChatWidget.jsx line 308 - dine: ['Compare Meal Plans', 'Ask about ingredients', 'Transitioning to fresh']

P2_hero_text_contrast.details: Hero H1 'Fresh Meals for Mystique' has white text (rgb(255,255,255)) with drop-shadow. Gradient overlay is 'from-gray-900/95 via-gray-900/85 to-gray-900/60' providing strong contrast.
P2_hero_text_contrast.code_reference: MealsPage.jsx line 192 - bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-900/95 via-gray-900/85 to-gray-900/60

P2_mira_orb_size.details: MiraOrb is using size='sm' (48px orb, 80px glow, 100px outerGlow) instead of previous 'md' size (64px orb). Verified element sizes match sm config.
